zh-CN.name: 桂花
zh-CN.intro: 桂花是一种小小的黄花，长在树上，秋天开放，香气飘得很远很远，让人闻了心情好好。

story.title: 🌼小桂花找朋友
story.body: 秋天到了，桂花树上开出了许多小花，金黄金黄的，香香的。小桂花想：要是有朋友陪我玩多好呀！风姐姐听见了，轻轻一吹，把香味送到了小蜜蜂的家。小蜜蜂闻到香味，飞过来了，说：“好香呀，我可以跟你玩吗？”小桂花开心地说：“欢迎欢迎！”小蜜蜂在花间跳舞，还采了一点甜花蜜。过了一会儿，小鸟也闻到了香味，落在枝头唱起了歌。小桂花觉得，秋天真是太美好了！从此以后，每年秋天，小桂花都会开出香香的花，等朋友来找它玩。

knowledge.title: 桂花可以做什么？
knowledge.body: 桂花不仅香，还可以吃。人们把桂花采下来，做成桂花糕、桂花茶，吃起来甜甜的，香香的，身体也暖暖的。

en.name: Osmanthus
en.intro: Osmanthus is a small yellow flower that grows on trees. It blooms in autumn and has a sweet scent that carries far away, making people happy.

story.title: 🌼Little Osmanthus Finds a Friend
story.body: Autumn came, and many little golden flowers bloomed on the osmanthus tree. They were so fragrant. Little Osmanthus thought: How nice it would be to have a friend to play with! Sister Wind heard this, gave a gentle blow, and carried the scent to Little Bee's home. Little Bee smelled the fragrance, flew over, and said, "Mmm, so sweet! Can I play with you?" Little Osmanthus happily said, "Welcome!" Little Bee danced among the flowers and gathered some sweet nectar. After a while, Little Bird also smelled the scent, landed on a branch, and sang a song. Little Osmanthus felt that autumn was truly wonderful! From then on, every autumn, Little Osmanthus blooms its fragrant flowers and waits for friends to come and play.

knowledge.title: What can osmanthus be used for?
knowledge.body: Osmanthus is not only fragrant but also edible. People collect the flowers and make osmanthus cake and osmanthus tea. They taste sweet and fragrant, and make you feel warm inside.
